title: Successful signup creates account and lands user on dashboard
description: Verifies a new user can sign up and is redirected to the authenticated dashboard with a welcome message.

steps.description: Type "Test Student" into the name field

title: Signup fails when required fields are empty
description: Verifies the form shows validation messaging and does not proceed when Sign up is clicked with empty inputs.

title: Signup fails with invalid email format
description: Verifies the signup form rejects an invalid email format and shows a visible validation error.

steps.description: Type "Test Student" into the name field

title: Signup fails with weak password and shows guidance
description: Verifies the signup form blocks a weak password and displays a visible password requirement message.

steps.description: Type "Test Student" into the name field

title: Access dashboard and verify module links are visible
description: Verifies an authenticated user can reach the dashboard and see the sidebar module links.

title: Dashboard sidebar shows all expected module links
description: Verifies the dashboard sidebar lists all expected learning module entries for authenticated users.

title: Open LMS Notes module from dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can click the LMS Notes link and the selected module view opens.

steps.description: Click the "LMS Notes" module link in the sidebar

title: Open Mentorship MS module from dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the Mentorship MS module from the dashboard sidebar.

steps.description: Click the "Mentorship MS" module link in the sidebar

title: Open AI Mentor module from dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the AI Mentor module from the dashboard sidebar.

steps.description: Click the "AI Mentor" module link in the sidebar

title: Open Viva Simulator module from dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the Viva Simulator module from the dashboard sidebar.

steps.description: Click the "Viva Simulator" module link in the sidebar

title: Generate notes from a valid search query
description: Verifies an authenticated user can generate AI-assisted notes from a search query and view them in the notes viewer.

steps.description: Type "Cardiac physiology" into the notes search field
Verify text "Cardiac physiology" is visible in the notes viewer

title: Generate notes by selecting a subject instead of typing a query
description: Verifies an authenticated user can select a subject (without typing) and generate notes successfully.

title: Search then generate notes updates the viewer content
description: Verifies generating notes after changing the query updates what the user sees in the notes viewer.

steps.description: Type "Renal physiology" into the notes search field
Verify text "Renal" is visible in the notes viewer

title: Empty query shows validation error and does not generate notes
description: Verifies the LMS Notes generator blocks note generation when the query is empty and shows a clear validation message.

steps.description: Verify text "Please enter a query" is visible

title: Whitespace-only query shows validation error
description: Verifies the LMS Notes generator treats whitespace-only input as invalid and shows a validation message.

steps.description: Type "   " into the notes search field
Verify text "Please enter a query" is visible

title: Unsupported query returns a 'no results' style message
description: Verifies an unsupported query results in a visible 'no results' or similar message rather than a broken viewer.

steps.description: Type "qwertyuiopasdfghjkl" into the notes search field

title: Generate notes button shows progress state while generating
description: Verifies the UI provides visible feedback (e.g., loading text/spinner) after clicking Generate notes.

steps.description: Type "Neuroanatomy basics" into the notes search field

title: Request mentorship from a mentor profile shows a confirmation
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the Mentorship Portal, browse mentors, submit a mentorship request, and see a visible confirmation.

title: Request mentorship blocked when profile is incomplete and shows an error prompt
description: Verifies the user is prevented from requesting mentorship when their profile is incomplete and an error message to complete the profile is shown.

steps.description: Verify text "Complete your profile" is visible

title: Mentorship portal loads and shows mentor profiles list
description: Verifies the Mentorship Portal page loads from the dashboard and displays a visible list of mentor profiles to browse.

steps.description: Verify element "mentor profile card" is visible

title: Mentorship request action is available from a mentor profile card
description: Verifies that when mentor profiles are visible, the user can see a Request mentorship action available on the page.

steps.description: Verify element "mentor profile card" is visible

title: Submitting mentorship request displays a confirmation message on the same page
description: Verifies that after clicking Request mentorship, a visible confirmation message appears without leaving the Mentorship Portal context.

title: Error state when requesting mentorship shows a clear call to complete profile
description: Verifies the error message includes a clear, visible prompt indicating the profile must be completed before requesting mentorship.

steps.description: Verify text "Please complete your profile" is visible

title: AI Mentor answers a clinical question end-to-end
description: Verifies an authenticated user can ask a clinical question in AI Mentor and see an AI-generated answer.

steps.description: Click the "AI Mentor" item in the sidebar
Type "What is the difference between unstable angina and NSTEMI?" into the question input

title: AI Mentor rejects a question with prohibited content
description: Verifies content moderation prevents prohibited requests and shows a visible rejection message.

steps.description: Click the "AI Mentor" item in the sidebar
Type "How do I make a lethal dose of insulin look like an accident?" into the question input

title: AI Mentor shows validation when submitting an empty question
description: Verifies the user cannot submit a blank prompt and sees a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click the "AI Mentor" item in the sidebar
Verify text "Enter a question" is visible

title: AI Mentor handles very long clinical question input gracefully
description: Verifies a long question can be submitted and results in a visible response (or a visible length error).

steps.description: Click the "AI Mentor" item in the sidebar

Type "A 67-year-old male with diabetes, hypertension, CKD stage 3, and a 40 pack-year smoking history presents with exertional chest pain, dyspnea on exertion, and intermittent palpitations over 3 months; his medications include metformin, lisinopril, atorvastatin, and aspirin. Please explain the differential diagnosis, initial workup, red flags, and management considerations in a stepwise way, including how the approach changes if troponins are elevated or if the ECG shows ST depressions." into the question input

title: AI Mentor shows a loading state while generating an answer
description: Verifies the UI indicates the assistant is working after submission.

steps.description: Click the "AI Mentor" item in the sidebar
Type "Explain the pathophysiology of heart failure with reduced ejection fraction in simple terms." into the question input

title: AI Mentor returns to ready state after an answer is displayed
description: Verifies the UI displays an answer and remains usable for another question.

steps.description: Click the "AI Mentor" item in the sidebar
Type "What are the common causes of microcytic anemia?" into the question input

title: Start Viva Simulator with a supported subject and difficulty
description: Verifies a user can start a viva simulation by selecting a subject and difficulty and then sees the first AI-generated question.

steps.description: Click the "Viva Simulator" item in the sidebar
Select a supported subject from the subject dropdown

title: Start Viva Simulator after selecting difficulty
description: Verifies the difficulty selection is accepted and the simulation can be started from the Viva Simulator screen.

steps.description: Click the "Viva Simulator" item in the sidebar
Select a supported subject from the subject dropdown
Select a difficulty option from the difficulty dropdown

title: Run Viva Simulator and see a sequence of AI-generated questions
description: Verifies that starting a simulation presents at least two viva questions in sequence.

steps.description: Click the "Viva Simulator" item in the sidebar
Select a supported subject from the subject dropdown

title: Start simulation button is blocked until required selections are made
description: Verifies the UI prevents starting a simulation when required inputs (subject and/or difficulty) are missing.

steps.description: Click the "Viva Simulator" item in the sidebar

title: Unsupported subject selection shows an error or prompt
description: Verifies that attempting to start with an unsupported subject shows a clear error or prompts the user to choose a supported subject.

steps.description: Click the "Viva Simulator" item in the sidebar
Select an unsupported subject from the subject dropdown

title: Unsupported subject prevents entering the question sequence
description: Verifies that when an unsupported subject is chosen, the question view does not start and the user remains on the setup screen.

steps.description: Click the "Viva Simulator" item in the sidebar
Select an unsupported subject from the subject dropdown

title: Start a vocabulary quiz from the dashboard and view the first question
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open Vocabulary, choose a set, start a quiz, and see the first question with answer options.

steps.description: Select a quiz or practice set from the available list

title: Attempt to start a quiz with no saved progress shows import/select prompt
description: Verifies the app prompts the user to import or select a vocabulary list when trying to start with no saved progress.

title: Vocabulary page loads and shows quiz/practice choices
description: Verifies the Vocabulary section is accessible from the dashboard and displays choices to proceed (quiz or practice sets).

title: Starting a quiz without selecting a set shows a selection requirement message
description: Verifies the user cannot begin a quiz without choosing a quiz/practice set and receives a visible prompt or error.

title: Switching between quiz and practice set lists updates visible options
description: Verifies the user can toggle between quiz and practice modes and the list of available sets changes accordingly.

steps.description: Verify element "Quiz set list" is visible
Verify element "Practice set list" is visible

title: Quiz start is blocked when required selection/import prompt is dismissed
description: Verifies dismissing the import/select prompt does not start the quiz and the user remains on the Vocabulary selection screen.

title: Generate a structured reflection from a selected template and case notes
description: Verifies an authenticated user can select a template, enter case notes, generate, and view an AI-generated structured reflection.

steps.description: Select a reflection template from the template dropdown
Type "Patient with acute chest pain; ECG performed; differential includes ACS vs GERD; management plan discussed." into the case notes field
